title: To Momus.
content:
Who read'st this book that I have writ,
    And can'st not mend but carp at it;
    By all the Muses! thou shalt be
    Anathema to it and me.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To Momus."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
